# [Phase 3] Implement Shape B: A2A Webhook Push Notifications

**Origin Session ID:** `27016011-8ae9-48bb-af87-9479dd5b0fd0`

## Intent
Implement Shape B (A2A webhook push notifications) for the Phase 3 autonomous wake substrate, per **ADR 0002**.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Implement HTTP POST webhook payload matching the MCP notification `data` field schema.
- [ ] Implement retry semantics (exponential backoff) and degraded subscription handling.
- [ ] Implement HMAC-SHA256 signing via `X-Neo-Wake-Signature`.
- [ ] Build against the contract defined in `learn/agentos/decisions/0002-phase3-wake-substrate-standards-alignment.md` §6.2.
